d:
Passive. Kulu's normal attacks trigger an explosion that deals [[80%]]<ATK> damage to the target and all adjacent units. All of Kulu's skills deal damage to both enemies and allies, but allies take [[70%]] reduced damage.
Active. Kulu unleashes her fury, bombarding the enemy side of the battlefield [[14]] times. Each strike hits a random tile, dealing [[90%]]<ATK> damage to all units on the target tile and its surrounding area within 1 tile. At least [[10]] strikes will hit areas with 1 or more enemies within, and at least [[6]] of those will target the area with the most enemies. After the bombardment, Kulu summons a gigantified Boomboom to deal [[250%]]<ATK> damage to all units on the enemy side of the battlefield.
Kulu only casts her Ultimate if there are enemies present on their side of the battlefield. She becomes [[unaffected]] while casting her Ultimate.
Each bombardment strike deals [[100%]]<ATK> damage.
Each bombardment strike deals [[110%]]<ATK> damage.
Each bombardment strike deals [[120%]]<ATK> damage.
Each bombardment strike deals [[130%]]<ATK> damage.

Passive. When a battle starts, Kulu bombs the enemy's border tiles closest to your side, creating debris that restricts movement and knocks back units on the affected tiles toward their own side of the battlefield. Debris blocking the center tile can be destroyed in [[6]] hits, but debris on the other tiles are indestructible.
Whenever the center debris is destroyed, Kulu marks the tile for an explosion that detonates after [[8]]s, covering it with debris once again.
Active. Kulu teleports to the nearest enemy, dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage to that enemy and knocking them into the air. She then returns to her original tile. If the target is on the allied side of the battlefield, Kulu knocks the enemy back toward their side by up to [[3]] tiles instead of knocking them into the air. Kulu is [[invincible]] while casting this skill.
Damage is increased to [[170%]]<ATK> when the skill is used actively.
Damage is increased to [[190%]]<ATK> when the skill is used actively.
Damage is increased to [[210%]]<ATK> when the skill is used actively.

Kulu summons Boomboom, which bounces [[3]] times between enemies. The first 2 bounces will target [[2]] [[frontmost]] enemies, devouring them. For the final bounce, Boomboom will target [[1]] [[rearmost]] enemy on the enemy side of the battlefield and releases all devoured enemies upon impact. Each bounce deals [[110%]]<ATK> damage to its target and adjacent units, reducing their movement speed by [[60%]] for [[3]]s. Devoured enemies cannot act or attack and will only take damage from Boomboom. If Boomboom could not find a valid target for the final bounce, it will instead travel [[3]] tiles deeper into the enemy side, unless blocked by terrain or the battlefield edges.
Each bounce deals [[120%]]<ATK> damage.
Each bounce deals [[130%]]<ATK> damage.
Each bounce deals [[140%]]<ATK> damage.
Increases ATK by [[6%]] during battle. Dealing damage to enemies will increase ATK by an extra [[0.6%]], stacking up to [[50]] times.
Increases ATK by [[8%]] during battle. Dealing damage to enemies will increase ATK by an extra [[0.8%]], stacking up to [[50]] times.
Increases ATK by [[10%]] during battle. Dealing damage to enemies will increase ATK by an extra [[1%]], stacking up to [[50]] times.

When a battle starts, Kulu applies an explosive debuff to all enemies, increasing their damage taken by [[10%]], which lasts until the end of the battle. When an enemy with the explosive debuff is defeated, Kulu turns them into a doom bomb that detonates after [[2]]s. The explosion deals [[210%]]<ATK> damage to all units within 2 tiles, plus extra damage equal to [[15%]] of the defeated enemy's initial HP. The extra damage cannot exceed [[300%]] of Kulu's ATK.
The doom bomb explosion deals [[240%]]<ATK> base damage.
The doom bomb explosion deals [[270%]]<ATK> base damage.

Each time a doom bomb detonates, Kulu enters Blast Mania for [[10]]s. While in Blast Mania, she gains [[35]] Penetration and the explosion radius of her normal attacks, Blast Mayhem, and Boomboom Bash skills expands to 2 tiles. Subsequent detonations will extend the duration of Blast Mania, but the effects will not stack.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, each normal attack increases ATK SPD by [[2]] and normal attack damage by [[1%]], stacking up to [[10]] times.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 12 ATK SPD, 18 Ranged DEF.

d: Kulu gains extra ATK SPD and Ranged DEF during battle. If there are no enemies on Kulu's half of the battlefield, her ATK SPD increases by [[40]] and her Ranged DEF increases by [[40]]. For each enemy present on Kulu's half of the battlefield, the buff values decrease by [[10]], down to [[20]]. Other allies on Kulu's half of the battlefield receive a portion of these buffs, benefiting by [[50%]] of their values.
